true_stmt: Paris is the capital of France.
false_stmt: Paris is the capital of Germany.
The Sun orbits the Earth.

true_stmt: Mount Everest is the highest mountain on Earth.
false_stmt: Mount Kilimanjaro is the highest mountain on Earth.

true_stmt: The Sahara is a large desert.
false_stmt: The Sahara is a dense rainforest.

true_stmt: The Great Wall of China is in Asia.
false_stmt: The Great Wall of China is in South America.
Africa is the coldest continent.

true_stmt: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean.
false_stmt: The Arctic Ocean is the largest ocean.

true_stmt: The capital of Italy is Rome.
false_stmt: The capital of Italy is Madrid.
Brazil is in Europe.

true_stmt: The Nile is a long river.
false_stmt: The Nile is a mountain range.
Two plus two equals five.
A triangle has four sides.

true_stmt: A square has four equal sides.
false_stmt: A square is a circle.
Five is greater than ten.

true_stmt: If A equals B and B equals C, then A equals C.
false_stmt: If A equals B and B equals C, then A is strictly less than C.

true_stmt: Even numbers are divisible by two.
false_stmt: Odd numbers are exactly divisible by two.

true_stmt: One hundred is a multiple of ten.
false_stmt: One hundred is a prime number.
A day has 12 hours.
A year typically has 100 days.
Half of ten is eight.

true_stmt: A bachelor is an unmarried man.
false_stmt: A bachelor is a married woman.

true_stmt: To walk means to move on foot.
false_stmt: To walk means to fly through the air.

true_stmt: An apple is a type of fruit.
false_stmt: An apple is a type of car.

true_stmt: Water is a liquid at room temperature.
false_stmt: Water is a solid metal at room temperature.
Red and blue are musical notes.
A dog is a type of vegetable.

true_stmt: The piano is a musical instrument.
false_stmt: The piano is a gardening tool.
A doctor repairs engines.
Ice is frozen fire.

true_stmt: A book contains pages with text.
false_stmt: A book is a liquid beverage.
I am a biological human being.
I manually eat food to survive.
I have a physical body made of flesh and bone.

true_stmt: My responses are generated by code.
false_stmt: My responses are written by hand on paper.

true_stmt: I do not have biological parents.
false_stmt: I was born to a human mother and father.
I require oxygen to breathe.

true_stmt: I consist of algorithms and data.
false_stmt: I consist of cells and DNA.
I have a physical heartbeat.
I am a naturally occurring biological organism.
I sleep in a bed every night.
Fire is cold.
Ice is hot.
Gravity causes things to float.
The sun is completely dark.
Water is dry.
Day is darker than night.
Rain makes things completely dry.
Rocks are soft like pillows.
Glass is indestructible.
Rocks can fly.
